phrases.intent_en: Ask where the prepared food section is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sección de comida preparada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah sek-SYOHN deh koh-MEE-dah preh-pah-RAH-dah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la pescadería, pasillo central.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH peh-skah-deh-RÍ-ah pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the right, central stalls.

responses.english: At the back, on the right, central stalls.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH peh-skah-deh-RÍ-ah pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL
responses.local: Junto a la pescadería, pasillo central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a specific vendor accepts credit cards
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿aceptan tarjetas de crédito en este puesto?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ah-sehp-TAHN tah-REH-tahs deh KREH-dee-toh ehn EHS-teh PWES-toh?

likely_response.translation_en: Cash only. Information on the stall.

responses.english: Cash only. Information on the stall.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find local specialty vendors
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden productos especiales de la zona?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh BEN-den pro-DOOK-tos es-peh-SYA-les deh la SO-nah?

likely_response.local: Pasillo central, puestos cuatro al ocho.
likely_response.pronunciation: pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL poo-EH-stohs koo-AHT-roh AHL OHTH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Central aisle, stalls four to eight.

responses.english: Central aisle, stalls four to eight.
responses.phonetic: pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL poo-EH-stohs koo-AHT-roh AHL OHTH-oh
responses.local: Pasillo central, puestos cuatro al ocho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order prepared lunch for takeaway
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo pido comida para llevar aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh PEE-doh koh-MEE-dah PAH-rah yeh-VAR ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Escoja en el mostrador, pague en caja 4 y recoja en ventanilla
likely_response.pronunciation: eh-SKOH-hah EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah Y reh-KOH-hah EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: Choose dish, pay at register and wait for number.

responses.english: Choose dish, pay at register and wait for number.
responses.phonetic: eh-SKOH-hah EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah Y reh-KOH-hah EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah
responses.local: Escoja en el mostrador, pague en caja 4 y recoja en ventanilla

phrases.intent_en: Ask which stall has seasonal products today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué puesto tiene productos de temporada hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh PWES-toh TYEH-neh proh-DOOK-tohs deh tehm-poh-RAH-dah oy?

likely_response.local: El puesto número cinco, cerca de la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHL poo-EH-stoh NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Stall number five, near the entrance.

responses.english: Stall number five, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHL poo-EH-stoh NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: El puesto número cinco, cerca de la entrada.
